expertSkills.workflowReview: Review installable workflows independently for semantic quality, security boundaries, portability, dependencies, and completion

errors.workflow_id_collision: The workflow ID already exists or collides with another workflow.
errors.workflow_in_use: The workflow is still referenced by a known consumer.
errors.destination_exists: The destination already exists; use --force to replace it.
errors.package_kind_mismatch: The package kind is not valid for this command.
errors.workflow_digest_conflict: The installed workflow has the same ID but different content.
errors.import_source_not_found: The import source was not found.
errors.import_source_invalid: The import source must be a workflow directory or package.

auto-decompose.description: Decompose-enabled entry pipeline. The LEAD evaluates the leading decompose stage first: skip it and the remaining stages run on a single change exactly like small-feature; take it and the LEAD fans the task out into multiple child changes, each driven through the decompose-free childPipeline (small-feature) under the conservative serial/parallel policy. The decompose stage is LEAD-audited, not a human gate.

bug-fix.description: Minimal bug-fix pipeline: propose, apply, an adaptive verification, then ship and archive.

full-feature.description: Full feature delivery pipeline: office hours validation, proposal with lead review, apply, a parallel fan-out of conditional expert reviews, a review cycle to drive fixes, then ship, archive, and retrospective.

goal-loop-evaluate.description: Goal-driven iteration for code-quality work judged against a rubric. define-goal -> iterate (evaluate gate, fresh reviewer per round) -> ship -> archive. The LEAD injects the concrete goal/rubric from goal-plan.md before round 1.

goal-loop-measure.description: Goal-driven iteration for measurable code targets (perf, scores, latency). define-goal -> iterate (measure gate) -> ship -> archive. The LEAD injects the concrete measure command/threshold from goal-plan.md before round 1.

goal-loop-research.description: Goal-driven iteration for autoresearch-style research and writing. The implementer researches inline and writes/refines a document; an evaluate gate (fresh reviewer per round) judges satisfaction against the goal. The tail is a report stage (no code to ship). A lower implementer handoff threshold (0.35) triggers earlier relay because research is context-heavy.

small-feature.description: Lightweight feature pipeline: propose, apply, a single standard verification with a review cycle, then ship and archive.

messages.inheritingStoreConfigNotice: {path} declares store '{store}'; planning stays local and configuration inherits from that store.
messages.inactiveStorePointerWarning: Warning: {path} declares store '{store}', but no such store is registered; the declaration currently has no effect. Register it with rasen store register <path> --id {store}.

messages.invalidRuntime: Invalid runtime '{runtime}' for {role}. Expected one of: claude, codex
messages.classificationAdvisory: This suggestion is advisory; you can override it with any available pipeline.
messages.noRunStateNote: No run-state (auto-run.json) found; run classification to select a pipeline.
messages.legacySkillHeading: Legacy skill IDs in pipeline '{pipeline}' (update the pipeline yaml):

prompt.workflowPickerInstructions: Space to toggle, A to select/clear all, Enter to confirm

propose.name: Propose change
propose.description: Turn a request into a complete proposal, specs, design, and task list

explore.name: Explore ideas
explore.description: Investigate ideas, problems, and requirements before committing to a change

new.name: Start change
new.description: Start a change and create its first artifact in the guided workflow

continue.name: Continue change
continue.description: Create the next artifact for an existing change

apply.name: Apply tasks
apply.description: Implement and track the tasks defined by a change

sync.name: Sync specs
sync.description: Merge a change's delta specs into the main specs without archiving it

archive.name: Archive change
archive.description: Finalize a completed change and move it into the archive

verify.name: Verify change
verify.description: Check that implementation matches the change artifacts before archiving

onboard.name: Onboard
onboard.description: Learn Rasen by completing a narrated workflow with real project work

help.name: Find help
help.description: Find the right Rasen command, skill, or workflow for your situation

office-hours-command.name: Office hours
office-hours-command.description: Pressure-test product demand and direction before building

verify-enhanced-command.name: Enhanced verification
verify-enhanced-command.description: Run artifact, code, security, browser, and visual checks scaled to the change

ship-command.name: Ship change
ship-command.description: Commit and deliver a completed change by PR, push, or local handoff

retro-command.name: Retrospective
retro-command.description: Review shipped work to capture patterns, decisions, and lessons

auto-command.name: Autopilot
auto-command.description: Orchestrate specialized agents through the full workflow end to end

review-cycle.name: Review cycle
review-cycle.description: Repeat review, triage, fixes, and re-review until the change is clean

handoff.name: Create handoff
handoff.description: Distill current context so another session or agent can continue

goal-plan.name: Plan goal
goal-plan.description: Define a long-running goal, success gate, and working plan

goal-iterate.name: Iterate goal
goal-iterate.description: Run one focused research or implementation round toward an active goal

goal-report.name: Report goal
goal-report.description: Evaluate goal results against the success gate and write the final report

goal-command.name: Run goal loop
goal-command.description: Orchestrate planning, iterations, and reporting for a long-running goal

benchmark.name: Benchmark
benchmark.description: Detect performance regressions by running repeatable timing and size benchmarks against budgets

careful.name: Careful
careful.description: Pause, explain, and confirm before any risky or irreversible shell command

chrome-use.name: Chrome Use
chrome-use.description: Drive the real Chrome browser via CDP for DOM snapshots, clicks, network capture, and screenshots

codebase-design.name: Codebase Design
codebase-design.description: Design it twice, deepen module boundaries, and keep implementation aligned with the intended architecture

codex.name: Codex
codex.description: Dispatch the OpenAI Codex CLI for an independent review or implementation pass

cso.name: CSO Audit
cso.description: Adversarial security review of the branch diff with confidence-scored, severity-tagged findings

design-consultation.name: Design Consultation
design-consultation.description: Extract, discuss, and lock in the project design system through guided dialogue

design-review.name: Design Review
design-review.description: Browser-based design audit grading visual hierarchy, typography, color, and responsiveness

freeze.name: Freeze
freeze.description: Restrict edits to a directory so writes outside the frozen scope are rejected

guard.name: Guard
guard.description: Full safety mode — destructive-command guardrails plus an edit boundary in one switch

investigate.name: Investigate
investigate.description: Reproduce, isolate, and root-cause a bug with evidence before attempting any fix

navigator.name: Navigator
navigator.description: A map of this repo's skills and workflows and when to reach for each

office-hours.name: Office Hours
office-hours.description: Pressure-test product demand and design direction before building

prototype.name: Prototype
prototype.description: Build a throwaway UI or logic spike to answer a question fast

qa.name: QA
qa.description: Explore the app via the CDP proxy, document evidence-backed issues, and fix findings

qa-only.name: QA (report only)
qa-only.description: The same exploration and health score as QA, but never edits code

review.name: Review
review.description: Pre-landing PR review with full codebase context, severity-tagged findings, and a fix loop

tdd.name: TDD
tdd.description: Red, green, refactor discipline with mocking guidance

unfreeze.name: Unfreeze
unfreeze.description: Lift the edit restriction set by freeze or guard

workflow-author.name: Workflow Author
workflow-author.description: Author installable workflows and pipelines safely, staged and independently reviewed

workflow-review.name: Workflow Review
workflow-review.description: Review installable workflows and pipelines independently for quality and security

commandDescriptionTemplates.toolsPrefix: Configure AI tools non-interactively. Use "all", "none", or a comma-separated list of: {ids}

telemetry.notice: Note: Rasen sends anonymous usage stats (command, version, OS, Node version, and a random id) to its own Cloudflare Worker. Opt out: RASEN_TELEMETRY=0

reasons.continueAuthoring: Missing artifacts still need to be created. Continue authoring with {workflow}.
reasons.readyForVerify: All tasks are complete. Run {workflow} to check the implementation.
reasons.readyForApply: All planning artifacts are complete. Start implementation with {workflow}.
reasons.exploreToPropose: Turn this into a change with {workflow}.
reasons.officeHoursToPropose: Turn this into a change with {workflow}.
reasons.skipAhead: {original} is not installed, so {workflow} is next.
